title: PortableCraftingInvs
description: A Spigot/Paper plugin to open virtual crafting inventories.
body:
# What's this?
This plugin allows player to execute commands to open up crafting inventories (Smithing Table, Crafting Table, etc), all furnace types, brewing stand, and their Enderchest on the go.

If enabled in the config, this plugin will collect data using [bStats](https://bstats.org/); you can view all of the information collected by PCI by going to [its project page](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/PortableCraftingInvs/5752).

**If you are looking for a version that is not supported here on Modrinth you may find it on [Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/portable-crafting-inventories.61045/).**

**_There are no plans to back-port this plugin to any earlier versions._**

## This plugins requires Java 21 in-order to function.

# Features
This plugin allows you to open a virtual inventory from any of the following:
- Enderchest
  - Enderchest restrictions (allow depositing but not retrieval).
- Crafting table
- Anvil
- Enchantment Tables
  - With the ability to define a custom level.
    - If unprovided standing near bookshelves will impart their boosts.
- Catrography table
- Grind Stone
- Loom
- Smithing Table
- Stone Cutter
- Brewing stands
- Furnace, Smoker, and Blast Furnace

All of these inventories may be disabled in the 'settings.yml' file.

Server admins can also place signs which will open a virtual inventory when clicked!
